content.text:
I'll help you with those smart home controls.

<tool_call>tool: lights_off</tool_call>
<tool_call>tool: lock_doors</tool_call>
<tool_call>tool: set_thermostat, temp: 68</tool_call>

I've executed the following actions:
1. Turned off all the lights
2. Locked all the doors
3. Set the thermostat to 68°F

All tasks have been completed successfully!

prompt: Turn off all lights, lock the doors, and set thermostat to 68F
